name: maya-c1-parent-reaction
walkthrough_voiceover: I made a story for my five-year-old. A minute later, I was reading the opening on my phone. Her name, her best friend, her dog. I cried before I finished it. So I bought the full fifteen minutes. Now she asks for it every night.

spoken_captions.text: A minute later, I was reading the opening.
I cried before I finished it.

end_card.headline: Read the opening. You'll know.
end_card.subline: Read the opening free · €29.99 if you love it
